chapter_context.summary: Detailed instructions for the transport of the Tabernacle's most holy items by the Kohathites and other families.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Duties of the Kohathites (4:1-20), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Duties of the Gershonites (4:21-28), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Duties of the Merarites (4:29-33), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Summary of the Census (4:34-49), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.

key_themes.title: God's Faithfulness
key_themes.description: God sustaining His people despite their repeated rebellions.

key_themes.title: The Census
key_themes.description: The organization and numbering of the new generation.

devotional.question: How can we learn from Israel's mistakes and choose trust over complaining?
In what ways has God 'cloud and fire' guided your path recently?

cultural_historical.title: The Wilderness Journey
cultural_historical.text: The journey from Sinai to Moab was meant to be brief but became a 40-year period of purification for the nation.
